objective: Screen candidate projections of the Wave 39 heuristic signature target to identify whether any coarser diagnostic target has usable train/dev/test support.
non_negotiables: The inventory must evaluate only label_kind=heuristic rows.
Projection metrics must report unseen dev/test labels relative to train.
The inventory must not promote heuristic rows into exact supervision.
Any projection with good split support must still be treated as diagnostic until a replay-compatible exact value rule exists.

tasks.prompt: Add a heuristic-target-projection-report CLI command that screens direct and derived projections of signature diagnostic outputs with compact split-support metrics.
outputs: Projection smoke test covering seen and unseen split labels
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: Projection extraction parses component material and mobility signatures deterministically.
The report records per-split majority accuracy and unseen-label counts.
The smoke test covers a seen dev projection label and an unseen test projection label.

tasks.prompt: Run the projection inventory over docs/signature_target_diagnostic_wave_39.jsonl, record the report hash and projection summary, and update ledgers without opening promotion.
acceptance: The report screens 9 projections over 30 heuristic rows.
Only component_topology_family has zero dev/test unseen labels.
Full signature and topology-material-mobility projections remain 30-label targets.
Docs state that projection support is diagnostic only.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_41_signature_target_projection_inventory.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 41 plan is internally consistent.
The projection inventory report is valid JSON.

integration_gates.command: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py && python3 engine/test.py
integration_gates.success_signal: The projection inventory implementation and regression smoke pass.
